template:
def merge_ranges(ranges)
  return [] if ranges.empty?
  
  sorted = ranges.sort_by [[SLOT sort_block]]
  merged = [sorted.first]
  
  sorted[1..-1].each do |current|
    last = merged.last
    
    if [[SLOT overlap_check]]
      merged[-1] = [[SLOT merged_replace]]
    else
      merged [[SLOT append_op]] current
    end
  end
  
  merged
end
prompt: Pick the sort block, the overlap predicate, the merged-range expression, and the append operator.
